title: deparia pterorachis
intro: Deparia pterorachis, also known as the lesser shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Eastern herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deparia pterorachis include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Deparia pterorachis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
